description: Compact redacted SDK field availability corpus derived from local raw captures. Includes SDK variable schema, SDK-declared shape/type maximums, and sampled availability summaries, but no raw telemetry frames, full session YAML, driver names, user IDs, or team names.

fields.name: AirDensity
fields.description: Density of air at start/finish line

fields.name: AirPressure
fields.description: Pressure of air at start/finish line

fields.name: AirTemp
fields.description: Temperature of air at start/finish line

fields.name: BrakeABSactive
fields.description: true if abs is currently reducing brake force pressure

fields.name: BrakeRaw
fields.description: Raw brake input 0=brake released to 1=max pedal force

fields.name: CarDistAhead
fields.description: Distance to first car in front of player in meters

fields.name: CarDistBehind
fields.description: Distance to first car behind player in meters

fields.name: CarIdxClass
fields.description: Cars class id by car index

fields.name: CarIdxClassPosition
fields.description: Cars class position in race by car index

fields.name: CarIdxEstTime
fields.description: Estimated time to reach current location on track

fields.name: CarIdxF2Time
fields.description: Race time behind leader or fastest lap time otherwise

fields.name: CarIdxFastRepairsUsed
fields.description: How many fast repairs each car has used

fields.name: CarIdxLapDistPct
fields.description: Percentage distance around lap by car index

fields.name: CarIdxOnPitRoad
fields.description: On pit road between the cones by car index

fields.name: CarIdxP2P_Count
fields.description: Push2Pass count of usage (or remaining in Race)

fields.name: CarIdxPaceFlags
fields.description: Pacing status flags for each car

fields.name: CarIdxPaceLine
fields.description: What line cars are pacing in  or -1 if not pacing

fields.name: CarIdxPaceRow
fields.description: What row cars are pacing in  or -1 if not pacing

fields.name: CarIdxPosition
fields.description: Cars position in race by car index

fields.name: CarIdxQualTireCompoundLocked
fields.description: Cars Qual tire compound is locked-in

fields.name: CarIdxSteer
fields.description: Steering wheel angle by car index

fields.name: CarIdxTrackSurface
fields.description: Track surface type by car index

fields.name: CarIdxTrackSurfaceMaterial
fields.description: Track surface material type by car index

fields.name: CarLeftRight
fields.description: Notify if car is to the left or right of driver

fields.name: CpuUsageBG
fields.description: Percent of available time bg thread took with a 1 sec avg

fields.name: CpuUsageFG
fields.description: Percent of available time fg thread took with a 1 sec avg

fields.name: DCDriversSoFar
fields.description: Number of team drivers who have run a stint

fields.name: DCLapStatus
fields.description: Status of driver change lap requirements

fields.name: DisplayUnits
fields.description: Default units for the user interface 0 = english 1 = metric

fields.name: EnterExitReset
fields.description: Indicate action the reset key will take 0 enter 1 exit 2 reset

fields.name: FastRepairAvailable
fields.description: How many fast repairs left  255 is unlimited

fields.name: FastRepairUsed
fields.description: How many fast repairs used so far

fields.name: FrontTireSetsAvailable
fields.description: How many front tire sets are remaining  255 is unlimited

fields.name: FrontTireSetsUsed
fields.description: How many front tire sets used so far

fields.name: GpuUsage
fields.description: Percent of available time gpu took with a 1 sec avg

fields.name: HandbrakeRaw
fields.description: Raw handbrake input 0=handbrake released to 1=max force

fields.name: IsDiskLoggingActive
fields.description: 0=disk based telemetry file not being written  1=being written

fields.name: IsOnTrack
fields.description: 1=Car on track physics running with player in car

fields.name: LFTiresAvailable
fields.description: How many left front tires are remaining  255 is unlimited

fields.name: LFTiresUsed
fields.description: How many left front tires used so far

fields.name: LFcoldPressure
fields.description: LF tire cold pressure  as set in the garage

fields.description: Player best N average lap time

fields.description: Delta time for session optimal lap

fields.name: LapDeltaToSessionOptimalLap_OK
fields.description: Delta time for session optimal lap is valid

fields.name: LapDist
fields.description: Meters traveled from S/F this lap

fields.name: LapLasNLapSeq
fields.description: Player num consecutive clean laps completed for N average

fields.name: LapLastNLapTime
fields.description: Player last N average lap time

fields.description: How many left tire sets are remaining  255 is unlimited

fields.name: LeftTireSetsUsed
fields.description: How many left tire sets used so far

fields.description: True if the car_num texture will be loaded

fields.description: Memory soft page faults per second

fields.description: True if it is ok to reload car textures at this time

fields.description: True if steering wheel force is using linear mode

fields.description: Raw throttle input 0=off throttle to 1=full throttle
